title: rubus elongatus
intro: Rubus elongatus, also known as the Himalayan raspberry, is a species of flowering plant in the rose family that is native to the Himalayan region. The plant's leaves and roots have been used in traditional medicine for their medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Rubus elongatus include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting immune function. The plant can be prepared into various herbal remedies, such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
